84],[332,543,1776547810497],[336,546,1776547810511],[338,547,1776547810530],[337,548,1776547810542],[335,548,1776547810552],[335,549,1776547810562],[334,549,1776547810570],[333,550,1776547810578],[332,550,1776547810594],[330,551,1776547810602],[329,551,1776547810607],[328,551,1776547810625],[327,552,1776547810632],[326,553,1776547810650],[325,553,1776547810656],[324,553,1776547810672],[324,554,1776547810684],[323,554,1776547810700],[323,553,1776547810713],[322,553,1776547810730],[321,553,1776547810736],[320,553,1776547810749],[320,552,1776547810762],[319,552,1776547810778],[318,552,1776547810791],[317,551,1776547810803],[316,551,1776547810812],[315,551,1776547810819],[314,551,1776547810833],[314,551,1776547810848],[313,551,1776547810857],[313,552,1776547810875],[312,552,1776547810889],[311,552,1776547810908],[310,553,1776547810926]],"mm-mp":17.52317880794702,"md":[[325,553,1776547810691]],"md-mp":3452.25,"mu":[[325,553,1776547810836]],"mu-mp":3470.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
